Class Comic

java.lang.Object
product.Product
product.StoreProduct
product.Comic
public class Comic extends StoreProduct
Class name: Comic

Description: It implements the comics

  • Constructor Details

    • Comic

      public Comic(String id, double price, String name, String description, String photo, double averagePunctuation, LocalDate addedDate, int stock, int numPages, Year year, String author, String editorial, Category... categories)
      A comic's general constructor
      Parameters:
      id - the comic's id
      price - the comic's price
      name - the comic's name
      description - the comic's description
      photo - the comic's photo's path
      averagePunctuation - the comic's average punctuation
      addedDate - the comic's added date
      stock - the comic's stock
      numPages - the comic's number of pages
      year - the comic's publishing year
      author - the comic's author
      editorial - the comic's editorial
      categories - the comic's categories

    • Comic

      public Comic(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPages, Year year, String author, String editorial, Category... categories)
      The comic's constructor

      price - the comic's price
      name - the comic's name
      description - the comic's description
      photo - the comic's photo's path
      stock - the comic's stock
      numPages - the comic's number of pages
      year - the comic's publishing year
      author - the comic's author
      editorial - the comic's editorial
      categories - the comic's categories
